name: siyuan-autotag
description: AutoTag plugin for reviewable AI classification in SiYuan

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const path of ['dist', 'package.zip', 'i18n', 'index.js', 'index.js.map', 'index.css', 'index.css.map', 'static']) { try { fs.rmSync(path, { recursive: true, force: true }); } catch (error) { if (path !== 'static') throw error; } }"

author: dapan <88124028+sonicpic@users.noreply.github.com>
